fields.Name: List Shared
fields.Description: A user granted permission on a List to another user or role (direct share, not invitation). Emitted by ListSharing.Share.

fields.Name: List Unshared
fields.Description: A user revoked a previously-granted permission on a List. Emitted by ListSharing.Unshare.

fields.Name: List Invitation Sent
fields.Description: A pending-email invitation to share a List was created. Emitted by ListSharing.Invite.

fields.Name: List Invitation Accepted
fields.Description: A previously-sent List invitation was accepted; the corresponding ResourcePermission was granted. Emitted by ListSharing.AcceptInvitation.

fields.Name: List Invitation Revoked
fields.Description: A pending List invitation was revoked before acceptance. Emitted by ListSharing.RevokeInvitation.

fields.Name: List Refreshed
fields.Description: A List was refreshed against its source view via ListOperations.RefreshFromSource.

fields.Name: List Bulk Operation
fields.Description: A bulk mutation was applied to a List (set-op compose, refresh, bulk-move, etc).
